nodes.context: Chinese crime syndicate involved in loan sharking and extortion, active in northern California and the Bay Area.
Proposed umbrella organization intended to dominate crime in Chinatowns throughout the U.S.

edges.evidence_quote: This was a first step in an effort to form an umbrella organization called Tien Ha Wui ("Whole Earth Association") that would dominate crime in Chinatowns throughout the U.S.
edges.context: Wo Hop To sought to create Tien Ha Wui as an umbrella organization to unify crime operations.
